_note: Mock article metadata only. No full article body text. No copyrighted content stored. source_url values are placeholders.
_rules: content_body is always null for articles unless license explicitly allows full text.
summary is a short description only (1-3 sentences), not extracted article body.
source_url must always be preserved and never removed.
license_type is no-full-text by default for all third-party articles.
